Module 6:
Will Hamilton’s “Tennis
Ninja” Sales Video Breakdown
!
Executive Summary
• 	The Tennis Ninja launch is a great example of the Launch Echo. This is
when the launch leads to many other great opportunities, which is quite
common.
• 	Will’s Sales Video begins by reflecting on the prelaunch videos. Straight
away he’s direct and says today is the day you decide if you want to join
the program
• 	The Big promise: “From the seat you’re currently sitting in you’ll become
a much better player.”
• 	Now he could have implemented a story right here, but did not
• 	Later on makes analogy to the movie The Matrix - this is powerful
• 	Next he brings up the hidden benefits - important to mention these
because they’re not always apparent
• 	Will did a good job of focusing on the benefits and transformation
• 	He probably could have made it feel more real if he had given an
example
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

• 	Even when he begins to talk about the “stuff” he focuses on the
transformation/benefits - this is very important
• 	This could still be more tangible - how will knowing more help you win
more?
• 	Will builds authority by dropping some big names - use this carefully
• 	Using insider jargon a little bit is great because it begins to build
community right away
• 	Will does a great job when he reveals price - right before he reveals he
gives a very strong “steal our stuff” guarantee
• 	He does a great risk reversal - he essentially juxtaposes it against a
college course or a private lesson
• 	First he reveals the price, then did the risk reversal with the guarantee
• 	Then he did a price juxtaposition - the price comparison versus
private lessons
• 	Then he reveals the payment plan
• 	After these pieces is when he stacks on the bonuses
• 	Will offers a bonus course that hasn’t even been created yet - you can do
this too! There’s no rule that it must be created beforehand
• 	The video ends with scarcity - “training starting soon so the cart closes”
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 3 --

• 	I would’ve liked to see right at the end him restate the transformation or
the big benefit
• 	After restating the transformation, you finish by restating the full offer
very briefly and then re-close at the end
!
3	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 3 of 3 --
